---
title: "Experience"
description: "Roles and internships across GIS, remote sensing, and ecological research."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  id: all-experience
  contents: "*/index.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  template: ../_ejs/timeline-card.ejs
  fields: [title, org, dates, location, description, path]
  page-size: 100
---

::: {#all-experience}
:::
